title: Scale 0: The Spark
description: What is a computer? From electromagnetism to the first instruction.

title: Scale 1: Bits & Variables
description: One switch. One light. One variable that changes everything.

title: Scale 2: Logic & Decisions
description: YES or NO. How computers make every choice, every time.

description: Repeat until right. The art of iteration and squashing bugs.

title: Scale 5: Systems & Projects
description: Small pieces become real tools. Build something that matters.
